name: json-viewer
description: JSON/JSONC visual editor with tree and code dual-pane

scripts.build: npm run build -w @json-viewer/shared && npm run build -w @json-viewer/client && npm run build -w @json-viewer/server && npm run build -w @json-viewer/electron
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && npm run package -w @json-viewer/electron
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,electron -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @json-viewer/server" "npm run dev -w @json-viewer/client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3847/api/health && npm run dev -w @json-viewer/electron"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @json-viewer/server" "npm run dev -w @json-viewer/client"
